overall.description: A first-person drive along a rain-soaked cyberpunk highway at night, featuring heavy fog, neon-lit billboards, and concrete infrastructure. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcases cinematic lighting with street lamps reflecting off wet asphalt as the camera passes under an overpass and through an industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with commercial billboards and striped safety barriers

events.description: ambient light dims as the camera approaches the shadow of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: cruising along the rain-slicked highway, approaching the overpass with digital billboards visible on the left

entered.detail: yellow and black striped concrete safety barrier running along the right side of the highway
large illuminated digital advertisement screens displaying colorful graphics on the left side
tall sodium vapor street lamps casting warm orange light through the rain and fog
elevated concrete highway structure looming ahead in the mist
tall industrial towers with red warning lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, rain-soaked cyberpunk highway at night. The camera moves forward past a striped concrete barrier on the right, with glowing digital billboards and street lamps illuminating the left side. In the distance, an overpass structure and red-lit industrial towers emerge from the mist as ambient light gradually dims.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with directional signage and utility infrastructure

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the highway overpass, reducing rain exposure
exiting the underpass back into the open rainy night

agents.ego_description: passing under the concrete overpass, navigating through the sheltered section with road signs overhead

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling and support columns creating a tunnel-like effect
overhead sign structure displaying directional arrows and destination text
large beige utility box with warning stripes and electrical equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the sheltered space beneath the highway overpass, where the concrete ceiling blocks most of the rain and sky. Overhead directional signs and a utility box appear on the right. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial underpass lights and the gloom of the covered structure before emerging back into the open rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway corridor with retaining walls and warehouse buildings

events.description: transitioning from commercial billboard zone to industrial warehouse district

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open highway past industrial warehouses and concrete retaining walls in the heavy rain

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with graffiti and weathered surfaces replacing the striped barrier
large industrial buildings with flat roofs and minimal lighting visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into an industrial highway corridor. The striped barrier is replaced by a tall concrete retaining wall on the right, with warehouse buildings visible beyond. Digital billboards continue to line the left side, their glow reflecting off the wet pavement as the camera drives deeper into the foggy industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked cyberpunk highway that transitions from an open, neon-lit road into a sheltered underpass and finally into a dense industrial corridor. It begins by gliding past a striped concrete barrier under the glow of digital billboards and street lamps, while red-lit industrial towers emerge from the distant fog. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into the gloom of a highway overpass, where the concrete ceiling blocks the rain and the lighting turns to artificial overhead fixtures and directional signage. The camera then emerges from the shelter back into the open rain, where the striped barrier is replaced by a tall concrete retaining wall. Finally, the view expands into a foggy industrial zone, with the glow of billboards reflecting off the wet pavement as the camera drives deeper past looming warehouse buildings.
